assertions.assertion: Response mentions a migration analysis tool or controller (MigrationAnalysisController) that can be added to the existing IS4 project
assertions.rationale: States 'Duende provides a Migration Analysis Tool (MigrationAnalysisController.cs) that you can add to your existing IdentityServer4 project.'

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool inspects the running IdentityServer4 instance to provide recommendations
assertions.rationale: States 'It inspects your running IdentityServer4 instance and produces a report with specific migration recommendations.'

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool checks client counts (interactive vs non-interactive) which helps determine the Duende license edition needed
assertions.rationale: Table entry: 'Client inventory (interactive vs. non-interactive) — this determines which Duende license edition you need.'

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool checks data protection configuration (application discriminator and/or key repository)
assertions.rationale: Table includes both 'Data protection application name' (flags missing discriminators) and 'Data protection repository type' (warns about ephemeral storage).

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool checks authentication schemes for compatibility
assertions.rationale: Table entry: 'Authentication schemes — Lists all registered authentication handlers. Flags non-Microsoft, non-IdentityServer4 handlers.'
